channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Gulf Crisis Report Flags High Risks to Energy, Food, Transport, Tourism and Government Budget
item.description: A May 2026 rapid assessment by Tanzania’s National Planning Commission (NPC), in collaboration with UNDP, has concluded that the ongoing Gulf crisis is creating significant economic pressure across ke...

item.title: Supreme Court hears case on Twisha Sharma death amid dowry allegations and probe irregularities
item.description: The Supreme Court of India is scheduled to hear a suo motu case concerning the death of 32-year-old actor-model Twisha Sharma, which occurred at her matrimonial home in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The cas...

item.title: NCAA pauses enforcement of ‘No Pay, No Service’ policy amid talks over N12bn airline debts
item.description: The Nigeria Civil Aviation Authority (NCAA) has suspended the enforcement of its planned ‘No Pay, No Service’ directive that was earlier targeted at 11 operating airlines over unpaid statutory charges...

item.title: South Africa increases regional cooperation with neighbouring states to address undocumented migration and border management
item.description: The South African government is intensifying cooperation with neighbouring countries in response to rising concerns over undocumented migration and border security. According to a written parliamentar...

item.title: PM Shehbaz and Chinese Premier Li Qiang discuss Middle East peace and strengthening Pakistan-China cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Monday held an important meeting with Chinese Premier Li Qiang at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing, where both leaders discussed bilateral relations and the evo...

item.title: First responders rescue infant from vehicle swept into floodwaters in Beeville, Texas
item.description: First responders in Beeville, Texas, carried out a dramatic rescue after a vehicle became trapped and partially swept away by rapidly rising floodwaters during severe storms. The incident occurred at ...

item.title: Kim Chiu reacts humorously to her breakup scene during It’s Showtime segment
item.description: An ABS-CBN Entertainment report published on May 25, 2026 highlights a lighthearted moment from the noontime variety show It’s Showtime, where actress and host Kim Chiu was seen reacting with uncontro...

item.title: Sam Amadi raises concern over worsening party primary processes ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: Sam Amadi, the Director of the Abuja School of Social and Political Thoughts, don talk say Nigeria dey experience the worst phase of party organisational politics as the country dey prepare for the 20...

item.title: Truck overturn in central Bangladesh kills 15 and injures several passengers
item.description: At least 15 people have died and around 10 others have been injured following a serious road accident in central Bangladesh, when a truck overturned early on Monday morning. The crash occurred at appr...

item.title: Three children still missing in Limpopo as search for toddler Omphile Sethole continues
item.description: Families in Limpopo are enduring growing distress as three children remain missing in separate incidents reported across the province since the beginning of 2026. The most high-profile case involves t...

item.title: Over 1.5 Million Pilgrims Begin Haj in Makkah Amid Middle East Tensions and Security Concerns
item.description: Over 1.5 million Muslims from around the world have started the annual Haj pilgrimage in Makkah, Saudi Arabia, gathering in the vast tent city of Mina after performing tawaf around the Holy Kaaba. The...

item.title: Fubara restates APC membership and highlights completion of Rumuigbo General and Neuropsychiatric Hospitals in Rivers State
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, has publicly reaffirmed that he remains a member of the All Progressives Congress (APC), putting to rest recent rumours suggesting he had defected to anot...

item.title: PNP joins investigation into Pampanga hotel construction site collapse in Angeles City
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has confirmed that it is assisting in the ongoing investigation into a major building collapse in Angeles City, Pampanga, which occurred at a hotel construction si...

item.title: Timeline of AFL great Neale Daniher’s life, career and motor neurone disease advocacy
item.description: Neale Daniher, one of Australian Rules football’s most respected figures, has been remembered through a detailed timeline of his life, career and off-field legacy following his death aged 65. Born on ...

item.title: How agentic AI is transforming marketing and commerce through Google’s new tools
item.description: The article explores the rise of agentic artificial intelligence and its growing impact on consumer behaviour and digital marketing. Unlike traditional generative AI, which responds to prompts by prod...

item.title: Delhi experiences second warm night amid ongoing heatwave conditions; IMD maintains yellow alert
item.description: Delhi has recorded its second warm night of the season as temperatures continue to remain unusually high amid persistent heatwave-like conditions. According to data from Safdarjung, the city’s base we...

item.title: Review: Paul McCartney’s The Boys of Dungeon Lane highlights enduring melodic brilliance at 83
item.description: The review of Paul McCartney’s 27th studio album, The Boys of Dungeon Lane, presents the record as a reflective yet creatively vibrant work from the 83-year-old former Beatle. Framed partly as a nosta...

item.title: Fire at South Gate tire recycling facility contained after shelter-in-place order
item.description: Fire crews in Los Angeles County successfully knocked down a large industrial fire that broke out Sunday afternoon at a tire-recycling facility in South Gate, California. The blaze, which produced hea...

item.title: PM Shehbaz discusses Middle East peace efforts and Pakistan-China cooperation during meeting with Chinese Premier Li Qiang
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, during his official visit to China, stressed the need for Pakistan and China to work closely together to support peace efforts in the Middle East amid the ongoing tensio...

item.title: Afenifere condemns attacks on Oyo schools, warns of rising insecurity in Yorubaland
item.description: The pan-Yoruba socio-political group, Afenifere, has raised serious concern over the recent coordinated attacks on three schools in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State. The incidents, which repo...
